scales.name: Major (Ionian)
scales.poetic_definition: The clear light of mid-morning. It declares space, sets the table, and leaves no doubt that the ground is dry beneath your boots.

scales.name: Natural Minor (Aeolian)
scales.poetic_definition: The soil at dusk. A heavy, quiet moisture that remembers everything we buried in the spring.

scales.name: Dorian Mode
scales.poetic_definition: A wandering, hopeful shadow. The sixth degree rises like a warm chimney smoke in a cold mountain pass.

scales.name: Phrygian Mode
scales.poetic_definition: Feral, dry prairie wind. The immediate half-step descent feels like stepping off a sudden ledge into the gulch.

chords.name: Major Triad
chords.poetic_definition: The structural frame. Like three heavy oak beams supporting a kitchen ceiling. Sturdy, warm, and resting on rock.

chords.name: Minor Triad
chords.poetic_definition: An interior reflection. The window pane after the rain, where the light is grey and the room is quiet.

chords.name: Dominant Seventh
chords.poetic_definition: A restless traveler. The tritone inside it demands a gate to open; it refuses to sleep until it finds the home key.

chords.name: Major Seventh
chords.poetic_definition: A sweet, lingering ache. The seventh floats just beneath the octave, a bird hovering in the warm thermal before the cold night.

intervals.name: Perfect Fifth
intervals.poetic_definition: The unshakeable horizon. The interval that does not argue; it simply is. It provides the absolute base frequency for all lineages.

intervals.name: Minor Third
intervals.poetic_definition: A soft surrender. Moving inward, admitting that we do not have all the answers but are willing to sit in the shade.

intervals.name: Tritone (Augmented 4th)
intervals.poetic_definition: The split rail fence. An unstable boundary that vibrates with electric charge. It is the exact seam where the system breaks open.

intervals.name: Perfect Fourth
intervals.poetic_definition: The unfinished archway. It lifts the ear upward, promising a room it has not yet built.
